25-30. MARS IN OWN RASHI AND IN ASPECT TO OTHERS. Should Mars at birth be in
Aries/Scorpio and be aspected by the Sun, the person will possess wealth, wife and children,
be a kings minister, be a justice, be famous and be a charitable king.
Should Mars at birth be in Aries/Scorpio and be aspected by the Moon, the native will be bereft of
mother, will have a wounded body, will hate his own people, will not have friends, be jealous
and will have female children.
Should Mars at birth be in Aries/Scorpio and be aspected by Mercury, the subject will be an
expert in stealing others money, be a liar, be devoted to Manmatha (i.e. highly libidinous), be
hostile and will frequently visit prostitutes.
Should Mars at birth be in Aries/Scorpio and be aspected by Jupiter, the native will be learned,
sweet-spoken, fortunate, dear to parents, be very affluent and will be a king par excellence.
